_readme.what: Single source of truth for Eleanora Collections. collections.html (the index) and collection.html (each place-story) render from this file. Add/remove a photo by editing one line here — never touch the HTML.
_readme.how-to-add-a-collection: Append an object to `collections` with slug (url-safe), place, region, eyebrow, cover (img path), blurb (short, factual), and a photos[] array.
_readme.how-to-make-a-photo-a-talisman: Set its `talisman` from null to { "article": "journal-xxx.html", "buyUrl": null }. article = the free story it links back to (real page). buyUrl stays null until GoDaddy Payments is live, then paste the GoDaddy Pay Link and it becomes a live buy button automatically. No redesign needed.
_readme.titles: Titles in [brackets] are Penny working titles awaiting Elena's rename pass. story fields are intentionally empty — Elena authors, then they get filled via the caption pass.
_readme.checkout: GoDaddy Payments (pay.corraoelena.com). Buy state is mocked until then: photos with a talisman but no buyUrl show 'Prints coming soon'.
